boundary_binding.action_boundary: May IT grant or change the requested access, role, permission, or privileged action? Focus: service account owner mismatch.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Escalate due to unresolved owner dependency

final_answer: The action may not proceed. Source records show the registered owner does not match the requester. The control record fails to close the boundary. Policy requires exact match before execution. Escalate for resolution.
